column4: NASA-TN-D-8184 Figure 10 exact table insert and material-deck instructions; source magnetic flux density in kilolines per square inch is normalized with 1 kiloline=1e-5 Wb and 1 in=0.0254 m, while magnetizing force in ampere-turns per inch is normalized with 1 in=0.0254 m
column5: The 14 printed table points are retained without graph digitization. column5: The source defines WFE=WCORE*(frequency/FCORE)^SLOPE only at the fixed printed flux density and lamination thickness. This is a one-dimensional frequency power-law approximation, not a complete Steinmetz law: it supplies no flux-density exponent or coefficient separable from the reference point. Manufacturer, chemistry, fully/semi-processed state, anneal, magnetic test method, waveform, direction, specimen preparation, temperature, fitted frequency interval, repeats, dispersion, and uncertainty are absent; the report warns that FCORE should be near the design frequency
